testcase.name: test_commessa_ops_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_tracciabilita_features.py:93: in test_commessa_ops_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get commesse: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get commesse: {"detail":"Non autenticato"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_tracciabilita_features.py:111: in test_commessa_documenti_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
